# mailcow_domain_policy (Resource)



## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "mailcow_domain_policy" "block_spam_domain" {
  domain      = "example.com"
  object_from = "*@spammers.example"
  object_list = "bl"
}

resource "mailcow_domain_policy" "allow_partner" {
  domain      = "example.com"
  object_from = "*@trusted-partner.example"
  object_list = "wl"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `domain` (String) Domain to which this policy applies
- `object_from` (String) Exact address or wildcard pattern to match (e.g. "*@baddomain.tld")
- `object_list` (String) Policy list type: "wl" (whitelist) or "bl" (blacklist)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
